$comment: Category tracking registry for conformance fixture directories. Keep arrays sorted alphabetically. Version consistency is enforced only for tracked categories.

untracked.bundle: Not yet migrated to tracked validation; fixture_count needs reconciliation
untracked.crypto: Deterministic golden vectors (Ed25519 sign/verify); not fixture packs
untracked.discovery: Not yet migrated to tracked validation; needs fixture pack audit
untracked.dispute: Not yet migrated to tracked validation; fixture_count needs reconciliation
untracked.issue: Not yet migrated to tracked validation; needs fixture pack audit
untracked.obligations: Not yet migrated to tracked validation; duplicate fixture names need resolution
untracked.parse: Single-receipt fixtures; uses expected_error/expected_variant, not fixture_count
untracked.policy: Not yet migrated to tracked validation; needs fixture pack audit
untracked.stripe-crypto: Per-category manifest; uses profile-scoped manifest.json, not global fixture_count
untracked.verifier: Fixtures span multiple releases (v0.10.8 + v0.10.10 DD-49); version consistency not enforced
untracked.workflow: Not yet migrated to tracked validation; fixture_count needs reconciliation
